metadata.title: For Creators - Turn Trends Viral, In Days
metadata.description: Quickly discover what will go viral, how to optimize, and where trends are heading

UseCasesSection.title: Research it. Optimize it. Ship it.

scenario1.question: What creative directions are hottest on TikTok right now, and which lane should I lean into?

scenario2.question: Between my video concept and my competitor's, which one will attract viewers more?

scenario3.question: Will this creative concept genuinely resonate with my fans?

metadata.title: For Influencers - Monetize Trust
metadata.description: Turn your influence into sustainable income with data-driven insights

scenario1.question: What do my fans truly care about? Which aspects of me do they find most interesting?

scenario2.question: Which persona trait should I emphasize to maximize fan engagement?

scenario3.question: What content format do my fans want most? Live streaming, knowledge sharing, or something else?

metadata.title: For Marketers - Real Voices, Real Conversions
metadata.description: Validate campaigns with real consumer insights before you launch

UseCasesSection.title: Test it. Validate it. Win it.

scenario1.question: What are my target consumers thinking right now? What are their real pain points?

scenario2.question: Will this ad copy genuinely resonate with consumers? What are their real reactions?

scenario3.question: Why do consumers choose competitors over us? How do they view our brand?

metadata.title: For Startup Owners - Kill Bad Ideas Early
metadata.description: Validate your startup ideas before spending time and money

UseCasesSection.title: Prove your concept. Fund your future.

scenario1.question: Does this market opportunity really exist? How strong is consumer demand?

scenario2.question: Will consumers accept my business model? Are pricing and delivery methods correct?

scenario3.question: Are my business model and product assumptions really valid? What risks am I missing?

metadata.title: For Consultants - Show Consumer Proof, Not Just Slides
metadata.description: Back your recommendations with real consumer research and insights

UseCasesSection.title: Research it. Prove it. Present it.

scenario1.question: Is my strategic advice to clients supported by consumer data? How can I present it most persuasively?

scenario2.question: Is my consulting solution really viable in the market? Will consumers accept this direction?

scenario3.question: The client is hesitant. How can I use consumers' real voices to convince them to adopt my recommendations?

metadata.title: For Product Managers - Innovation, De-Risked
metadata.description: Build products users actually want with real user insights

UseCasesSection.title: Listen to users. Build what matters.

scenario1.question: What's the next innovative feature users truly need? What haven't we thought of?

scenario2.question: Will users actually adopt this innovative feature? What are their reactions?

scenario3.question: Does my product innovation direction really solve users' core problems?
